title: polanisia diandra
intro: Polanisia diandra, also known as the Clammy Clover or Spiderflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America. The medicinal properties of Polanisia diandra include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and calm nervous system disorders. Polanisia diandra can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
